retro: Clean. No open automated issues, no stale sprint branches. plan/2026-04-29 merged same day.
backlog_health: Healthy. Five S-effort issues remain (#3, #6, #9, #48, #50). No exhausted S tier. No vague L-effort issues.

issues.title: Security: fix staging cookie token and add CSP header
issues.body: wmc_dev_auth cookie now stores a SHA-256 hash of the password (never the raw value). CSP header added to all HTML responses covering script-src, connect-src, frame-ancestors 'none', and form-action 'self'.

issues.title: Add automated tests for data parsing and worker routing
issues.meta: src/lib.js + tests/ + GitHub Actions — 46 tests total
issues.body: Pure functions extracted to src/lib.js. 37 unit tests cover parse511Roads, buildState, ageStr, dotState, parseUntilStr, inWestMarin. 9 worker tests (miniflare) cover CORS, .git 404, auth gate, and SHA-256 cookie. GitHub Actions runs npm test on every push to main.

blocker: CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN not available in build env — staging deploy requires manual: npx wrangler deploy --env dev
